=Index of values=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="bind"| value Swipe.bind >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Swipe >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|bind ~~compute~_final~_pos elt>> makes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|elt>> left~-right
   swipable on touch screens~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="bullets"| value Carousel.bullets >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~List of bullets for carousel~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox"| value Form.checkbox >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A customizable checkbox with position and style options~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="close"| value Icons.S.close >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Close icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-close>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="config"| value Icons.S.config >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Configuration ~/ gear icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-gear>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="debounced_input"| value Form.debounced_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive input where the debounced signal updates only after
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|delay>> seconds ~(default ~0~.~3~) of inactivity~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="disableable_button"| value Form.disableable_button >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A button that can be reactively disabled~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="drawer"| value Drawer.drawer >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Drawer >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Build a drawer menu on the left~, right~, top or bottom of the screen~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="dropdown"| value Buttons.dropdown >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Buttons >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="graceful_invalid_style"| value Form.graceful_invalid_style >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Adds the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-invalid">> class after each blur~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\H|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="hcf"| value Popup.hcf >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Popup >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Section with header~, content and footer~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="hsv_to_rgb"| value Color_picker.hsv_to_rgb >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Color_picker >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|hsv~_to~_rgb h s v>> converts ~H~S~(~V~/~L~) colors to ~R~G~B~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="icon"| value Icons.S.icon >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|icon classes ~(~)>> is an empty <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~<i~>>> element whose ~C~S~S classes
      are <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-icon">> followed by <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|classes>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="input"| value Picture_uploader.input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a file input element with good input type <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-pup~-input>> class
    and wrap it into a label~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="input_validation_tools"| value Form.input_validation_tools >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Given a validation function~, builds the necessary <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|oninput>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|onblur>>
    attributes for an input~, a reactive class attribute for error states~,
    and a signal with the validation result~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="int_input"| value Form.int_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An integer input with ~+~/~- buttons~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="iteri2"| value Lib.List.iteri2 >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.List >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="lwt_bind_input_enter"| value Form.lwt_bind_input_enter >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Bind an ~Lwt action to an existing input~, triggered on ~Enter key
    or optional button click~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="lwt_bound_input_enter"| value Form.lwt_bound_input_enter >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create an input with an ~Lwt action triggered on ~Enter key~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Toggle.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Toggle >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~?init~_up ~?up~_txt ~?down~_txt ~(~)>> produces a binary toggle~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Time_picker.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Time_picker >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~?action ~?round~_~5 ~?h~2~4 ~(~)>> produces a clock~-style time picker
    for hours and minutes~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Range.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Range >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~?txt~_up ~?txt~_down ~~f ~~lb ub>> produces a widget for picking
    one of the values in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~[lb~, ub~)>> via "up" and "down" buttons marked
    with the text <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|txt~_up>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|txt~_down>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Pulltorefresh.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Pulltorefresh >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Creates a pull~-to~-refresh container from an html element~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Color_picker.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Color_picker >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~(~)>> produces a color picker~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Carousel.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Creates a carousel from the elements of a list~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make"| value Calendar.make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Calendar >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make ~?highlight ~?click~_any ~?action>> produces a calendar~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make_date_picker"| value Calendar.make_date_picker >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Calendar >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make~_date~_picker ~?init ~(~)>> returns a client~-side reactive signal
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(y~, m~, d~)>> corresponding to the date <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|d>>~:<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|m>>~:<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|y>> that the user
    clicks on~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make_hours_minutes_seq"| value Time_picker.make_hours_minutes_seq >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Time_picker >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Alias of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="make_lazy"| value Carousel.make_lazy >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|same as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>> except for the last argument~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="mk_form"| value Picture_uploader.mk_form >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Ready~-to~-use form~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="mk_service"| value Picture_uploader.mk_service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|mk~_service name arg~_deriver>> ~Create a named service taking
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(arg~_deriver~, ~(cropping~, file~)~)>> parameter
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="next"| value Carousel.next >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Button to go to the next page ~(or more pages if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|offset>> is present~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="none_input_value"| value Form.none_input_value >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The string <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~-">>~, used as placeholder for empty optional int inputs~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\O|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="optional_int_input"| value Form.optional_int_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An integer input with ~+~/~- buttons that can be empty ~(~None~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="parse_date"| value Form.parse_date >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parse a date string in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Y~Y~Y~Y~-~M~M~-~D~D>> format~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="parse_time"| value Form.parse_time >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parse a time string in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~H~H~:~M~M>> format~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="password_input"| value Form.password_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A password input with a visibility toggle button~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="password_toggle"| value Form.password_toggle >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password~_toggle inp>> wraps an existing password input element <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|inp>>
    in a container with a visibility toggle button~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="plus"| value Icons.S.plus >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Predefined "plus" ~/ add icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-plus>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="prevent_double_submit"| value Form.prevent_double_submit >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A button that disables itself while the action <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> is running~,
    preventing double submissions~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="preview"| value Picture_uploader.preview >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a img element with no src~, no alt and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-pup~-preview>> class~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="previous"| value Carousel.previous >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Button to go to the previous page ~(or mores page if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|offset>> is present~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\Q|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="question"| value Icons.S.question >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Question mark ~/ help icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-question>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="radio"| value Form.radio >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A single radio button with label~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="radio_buttons"| value Form.radio_buttons >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A group of radio buttons with reactive selection~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="radio_selector"| value Form.radio_selector >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A styled container with label for a group of radio buttons~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactify_input"| value Form.reactify_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Make an existing input or textarea element reactive~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_checkbox"| value Form.reactive_checkbox >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive checkbox~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_date_input"| value Form.reactive_date_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive ~H~T~M~L~5 date input~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_fieldset"| value Form.reactive_fieldset >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A fieldset that can be reactively disabled~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_input"| value Form.reactive_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a reactive text input~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_select"| value Form.reactive_select >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|reactive~_select ~~options ~(~)>> creates a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~<select~>>> element with
    reactive selection tracking~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_textarea"| value Form.reactive_textarea >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a reactive textarea~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_time_input"| value Form.reactive_time_input >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive ~H~T~M~L~5 time input~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="reactive_toggle_button"| value Form.reactive_toggle_button >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A toggle button that alternates between on~/off states~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="ribbon"| value Carousel.ribbon >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Menu ~(or tabs~) for carousel~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="shutdown"| value Icons.S.shutdown >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Shutdown ~/ power icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-power>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="signout"| value Icons.S.signout >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Sign out ~/ logout icon ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-sign~-out>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="spinner"| value Icons.S.spinner >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Animated spinner icon
      ~(~C~S~S classes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-spinner ot~-icon~-animation~-spinning>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_of_date"| value Form.string_of_date >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Format a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(year~, month~, day~)>> triple as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Y~Y~Y~Y~-~M~M~-~D~D>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="string_of_time"| value Form.string_of_time >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Format a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(hours~, minutes~)>> pair as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~H~H~:~M~M>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="submit"| value Picture_uploader.submit >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a button with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-pup~-sumit>> clas
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="textarea"| value Form.textarea >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a textarea~, optionally with auto~-resize~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="tongue"| value Tongue.tongue >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tongue >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A tongue is an expandable panel that can appear from a side of the screen
   ~(usually top or bottom~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="user"| value Icons.S.user >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons.S >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Predefined icon for a user ~/ profile glyph
      ~(~C~S~S class <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-icon~-user>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\V|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="validate_as_int"| value Form.validate_as_int >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Validate a string as an optional integer~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\W|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="wheel"| value Carousel.wheel >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Carousel with ~3~D effect~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="with_spinner"| value Spinner.with_spinner >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Spinner >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~On client side~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|with~_spinner th>> returns immediately a spinner
    while ~Lwt thread <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|th>> is not finished~, that will automatically
    be replaced by the result of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|th>> when finished~.
>>
|
\\
